Sun In this case, Jupiter representing
Ven. life force is in Leo, a kingly house with
Mer. Ketu (child Slamdha). So, he will have
I a name as Raja or one beginning with
Dh. those letters.
Jupt.
Sat. Mars The peculiarity in this chart is
Dt. that Jupiter is conjunct Ketu and Mars
(a dogged type) and there are no plan
ets in four preceding and four succeed
ing houses. He will, therefore, be a
wanderer from childhood till he attains the age of 30 and undergo many trials
and tribulations. During his second round when Saturn enters Aquarius
between 31-33, there will be exalted Venus in the 2nd house to his own
(Aquarius) and the native will start his fortunate period and will also get
married.
As the Sun and Jupiter have exchange of places, and Jupiter: is in
conjunction with Mars and Ketu in Leo, the material comforts will be
increased after the birth of a son. The son will rise to become a very famous
person and bring great wealth to the parents.
